# 查询渠道包投放数据报表

1. 登录[华为应用市场应用推广平台](https://developer.huawei.com/consumer/cn/service/apcs/app/home.html)，选择“报表”。

   ![](./img/0000000000011111111.20250123103513.78581594794664261056959345418364:50001231000000:2800:BFFD9A8453582C70B8A5C346B46CC8F1650AE24D84408D5AE81C08C9A35E0982_610426bc4745.png)
2. 点击“自定义列”。

   ![](./img/0000000000011111111.20250123103513.08967456922445422838902295344945:50001231000000:2800:2CC7803086C4DF2BABCFFC2231091B8878961F15B2374EA50A125D218FA68842_49df915597c0.png)
3. 在“归因”区域中勾选“物理渠道包ID”，点击“确定”，即可查看渠道包投放数据。

   ![](./img/0000000000011111111.20250123103513.32266877967098864870286720422772:50001231000000:2800:7785C0F5547C8302A465DC5D07CF27F5A20C2CFC7ED90A3D54EF535CCC59CB82_14429e8fb747.png)
